result:
**Goal: Add zoom/scale functionality with multi-level viewport scaling.**

Currently the grid is rendered 1:1 (one terminal character per cell). Adding zoom lets users scale out to see large-scale emergent structures (e.g., 2x2 or 4x4 cells condensed into single characters using density-based glyphs like `░▒▓█`) and zoom back in for precise editing. This would enhance nearly every existing feature — pattern recognition at macro scale, heatmap visualization, race mode overviews, GIF recording of full-grid evolution — and is a natural missing piece for a visual cellular automata simulator. Keys: `+`/`-` to zoom in/out, `0` to reset to 1:1.
